creator: mikes@siralan.org
text:
I have two systems running FreeBSD 10.2-STABLE r286975 amd64.  Both systems are quad Opterons, one with 4 single core and the other with 4 dual core.

One is using xorg 7.7_1 (compiled some time ago from ports) and gnome3-3.16.2 obtained via pkg; the other is running xorg 7.7_2 and gnome3-3.16.2 obtained via pkg.

gnome-system-monitor operates correctly on the xorg 7.7_1 system but fails in the described manner with xorg 7.7_2.

This happens running either Cygwin/X x64 or Ubuntu Studio 14 x64.

I have both systems currently running; the bug is not a serious problem for me since other X11 programs are working correctly (with complaints); for example, virtualbox-ose operates properly on both.

Mike Squires
mikes@siralan.org
UN*X at home
since 1986
